response.justification: This candidate is a broad full-stack generalist whose C++ exposure is limited to one legacy embedded/instrumentation role (NI LabWindows/CVI) and a bachelor thesis project—neither on Windows capital-markets systems nor within the required 5–10 year timeframe as a primary focus. C++ does not even appear in the skills section. The only financial-services role used TypeScript/Node.js and touched investment process redesign rather than fixed income or derivatives systems. There is no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience, no Summit platform knowledge, and no capital-markets domain depth that would compensate for the missing C++ mandate.
strengths: Demonstrated exposure to a financial-services environment (investment platform role using TypeScript/Node.js and CI/CD practices)
Broad polyglot background (DLang, Java, C/C++, TypeScript) indicates adaptability to multi-language codebases
Strong CI/CD and DevOps experience (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) aligns with optional desirable skills
concerns: C++ is absent from the skills section and the only substantive C++ work is an embedded/instrumentation role unrelated to capital markets or Windows financial systems
No fixed income, fixed income derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge evident; the one fintech role was TypeScript-based product work
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle; SQL experience appears surface-level (listed as a skill without depth demonstrated in any role)

key_factors.factor: Capital markets / fixed income domain gap
